entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206.description: The Bell206 is a medium sized utility helicopter perfect for quick transport and support roles. It can carry moderate cargo loads, up to five passengers, and can be equipped with a hoist and a spotlight for specialized missions.
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_black.name: Black Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_blackstripe.name: Black-Striped Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_blue.name: Blue Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_brown.name: Brown Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_gray.name: Gray Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_green.name: Green Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_olive.name: Olive Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_orange.name: Orange Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_police.name: Police Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_red.name: Red Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_seagreen.name: Sea Green Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_skyblue.name: Light Blue Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell206_yellow.name: Yellow Bell 206
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell47g.description: The Bell 47G is a simple, yet versatile helicopter.  While it only seats two, it can carry cargo or extra fuel in optional external containers, making it ideal for either short cargo flights or medium trips to remote bases.  Small guns or rocket pods may also be mounted to the fuselage, though these can only fire the direction the helicopter is facing.  As such, they are not recommended against 'hot' ground targets.
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell47g.name: Bell 47G
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell47g_black.name: Black Bell 47G
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell47g_blue.name: Blue Bell 47G
entries.mtsofficialpack.bell47g_olive.name: Olive Bell 47G
entries.mtsofficialpack.comanche.description: The Comanche is a small, swift, twin-engine craft.  While the lower wing might pose a hazard on overgrown runways, it makes up for it by being faster and nimbler than other planes of its size.
entries.mtsofficialpack.comanche_blackred.name: Black-Red Comanche
entries.mtsofficialpack.comanche_blue.name: Blue Comanche
entries.mtsofficialpack.comanche_red.name: Red Comanche
entries.mtsofficialpack.comanche_seagreen.name: Sea-Green Comanche
entries.mtsofficialpack.comanche_yellow.name: Yellow Comanche
entries.mtsofficialpack.e500.description: The Eclipse 500, first flown in 2002, created a new class of aircraft: the very light jet, or VLJ. The MTS version is configured to seat six, with two pilot in the front and four passengers behind them. A great addition to any private airport, and quite efficient for its capacity and speed as well.
entries.mtsofficialpack.e500_blackred.name: Black & Red Eclipse 500
entries.mtsofficialpack.e500_blue.name: Blue Eclipse 500
entries.mtsofficialpack.e500_extravagant.name: Extravagant Eclipse 500
entries.mtsofficialpack.e500_green.name: Green Eclipse 500
entries.mtsofficialpack.e500_red.name: Red Eclipse 500
entries.mtsofficialpack.e500_silver.name: Silver Eclipse 500
entries.mtsofficialpack.e500_yellow.name: Yellow Eclipse 500
entries.mtsofficialpack.firetruck.description: The American LaFrance Pumper is a popular small fire truck, built and iterated since 1832. This rendition seats five, and comes equipped with a working siren, emergency lights, fire extinguishers and a water cannon.  A must-have for any town!
entries.mtsofficialpack.firetruck.name: Fire Truck
entries.mtsofficialpack.fordmustang69.descriptio: The Ford Mustang Mach 1 1969 is a true classic. Not only is it known for its raw power and speed, but also for its prestiege. While this vehicle might not be superb from a utility perspective, its perfect for showing off your net worth and getting from A to B quickly, given that you have proper roads.
entries.mtsofficialpack.fordmustang69_black.name: Black Ford Mustang
entries.mtsofficialpack.fordmustang69_lime.name: Lime Ford Mustang
entries.mtsofficialpack.fordmustang69_red.name: Red Ford Mustang
entries.mtsofficialpack.fordmustang69_white.name: White Ford Mustang
entries.mtsofficialpack.ft17.description: The Renault FT (frequently referred to in post-World War I literature as the FT-17, FT17, or similar) was a French light tank that was among the most revolutionary and influential tank designs in history.  Although hoplessly outclassed by modern tanks, the FT17 is still a formidable threat against infantry and lightly-armored vehicles.
entries.mtsofficialpack.ft17_blue.name: Blue Renault FT
entries.mtsofficialpack.ft17_gray.name: Gray Renault FT
entries.mtsofficialpack.ft17_olive.name: Olive Renault FT
entries.mtsofficialpack.ft17_tan.name: Tan Renault FT
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig.description: The GMC Brigadier is a Heavy-Duty truck made by GMC produced from 1978 to 1988.  Its solid frame combined with its ability to be equipped with a variety of beds makes it a solid addition to any city.
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_black.name: Black GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_blackwhite.name: Black-White GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_blue.name: Blue GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_brown.name: Brown GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_cream.name: Cream GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_gray.name: Gray GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_green.name: Green GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_maroon.name: Maroon GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_red.name: Red GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_tan.name: Tan GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.gmcbrig_white.name: White GMC Brigadier
entries.mtsofficialpack.mc172.description: The MC-172 is not fancy, but its cheap and sturdy airframe is at home on any rural Minecraft base.  High wings and a good power-to-weight ratio make this a good all-around starter.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mc172_acacia.name: Acacia MC-172
entries.mtsofficialpack.mc172_birch.name: Birch MC-172
entries.mtsofficialpack.mc172_darkoak.name: Dark Oak MC-172
entries.mtsofficialpack.mc172_jungle.name: Jungle MC-172
entries.mtsofficialpack.mc172_oak.name: Oak MC-172
entries.mtsofficialpack.mc172_spruce.name: Spruce MC-172
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230.description: The Mercedes 230CE is a coupe with class, creating a good middle ground between the Scouts utility and the Mustangs Speed. Its automatic transmission makes for a smooth driving experience and the trunk is perfect for some cargo... Just ignore the muffled screams.
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_beige.name: Beige Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_black.name: Black Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_blue.name: Blue Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_brown.name: Brown Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_extravagant.name: Extravagant Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_gray.name: Gray Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_green.name: Green Mercedes

entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_olive.name: Olive Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_police.name: Police Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_police2.name: Black Police Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_red.name: Red Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_salmon.name: Salmon Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_seagreen.name: Seagreen Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_silver.name: Silver Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_white.name: White Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.merc230_yellow.name: Yellow Mercedes
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzl37los.description: The PZL.37 Los is the dedicated twin-engined bomber of OCP. It can carry up to 8 bombs at once, bringing devastation upon anything in its sights. You can even install additional racks in the center of the plane for extra bombs! Three onboard machine-guns protect its hull from enemy aircraft at every angle, although you'll need a crew to operate those... The PZL.37 Los is the best choice if you're looking to 'adjust' villager population (and prices).
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzl37los.name: Gray PZL.37B Los
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzl37los_arctic.name: Arctic PZL.37B Los
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzl37los_brown.name: Brown PZL.37B Los
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzl37los_green.name: Green PZL.37B Los
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzl37los_tan.name: Tan PZL.37B Los
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzlp11.description: The PZL P11.c is a born and bred fighter aircraft. Its shoulder wing monoplane configuration provides the pilot with exceptional visibility of the sky and ground, and makes the PZL P11.c much faster than it's biplane fighter counterparts.
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzlp11.name: Gray PZL P11.c
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzlp11_brown.name: Brown PZL P11.c
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzlp11_green.name: Green PZL P11.c
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzlp11_tan.name: Tan PZL P11.c
entries.mtsofficialpack.quad.description: The Quad is a small all terrain vehicle, designed for one rider and a small amount of cargo. Due to its small size, it does not require assembly. Pop it down and ride away!
entries.mtsofficialpack.quad_gray.name: Gray Quad
entries.mtsofficialpack.quad_green.name: Green Quad
entries.mtsofficialpack.quad_olive.name: Olive Quad
entries.mtsofficialpack.quad_orange.name: Orange Quad
entries.mtsofficialpack.quad_red.name: Red Quad
entries.mtsofficialpack.quad_tan.name: Tan Quad
entries.mtsofficialpack.quad_white.name: White Quad
entries.mtsofficialpack.quad_yellow.name: Yellow Quad
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout.description: The International Harvester Scout is an offroad two door SUV made from 1961-1980. This SUV, the Scout II, was produced from 1971-1980. It seats two, with area for cargo in the back.
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_black.name: Black Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_blue.name: Blue Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_brown.name: Brown Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_gold.name: Gold-Plated Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_gray.name: Gray Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_maroon.name: Maroon Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_olive.name: Olive Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_orange.name: Orange Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_red.name: Red Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_seagreen.name: Sea-Green Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_tan.name: Tan Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_white.name: White Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_yellow.name: Yellow Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.scout_yellowwhite.name: Yellow-White Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk.description: The Skyhawk is the MC-172s successor, being more comfortable, faster and less splinter inducing, all whilst being just as maneuverable and easy to fly as its wooden counterpart. A perfect sequel to your flight journey!
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_blackorange.name: Black-Orange Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_blackred.name: Blackred Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_blackyellow.name: Yellow Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_blue.name: Blue Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_bluered.name: Blue-Red Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_bluestripe.name: Blue-Striped Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_brown.name: Brown Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_butter.subDescri: It also reeks of expired butter. Disgusting!
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_butter.name: OCP Butter Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_coffee.name: Coffee Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_green.name: Green Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_red.name: Red Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.skyhawk_red2.name: Red-Striped Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.trimotor.description: The Ford Trimotor is an old, yet trustworthy aircraft.  Its large wingspan provides ample lift for short takeoffs, as well as enough to maintain flight with one engine out.  With room for 12 passengers or crates, it's a great choice for long-haul flights where reliability (but not time) is of the essence.
entries.mtsofficialpack.trimotor_black.name: Black Ford Trimotor
entries.mtsofficialpack.trimotor_blue.name: Blue Ford Trimotor
entries.mtsofficialpack.trimotor_red.name: Red Ford Trimotor
entries.mtsofficialpack.trimotor_white.name: White Ford Trimotor
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair.description: The Vulcanair is a versitile six-seat, twin-engined, high-wing monoplane aircraft. Its spacious hull can be fitted with plenty of cargo or passagners. It can equip additional fuel tanks or even an onboard camera for aerial surveillence!
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_blackred.name: Black-Red Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_blue.name: Blue Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_cow.name: Cowpilled Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_gray.name: Gray Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_green.name: Green Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_orange.name: Orange Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_police.name: Police Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_red.name: Red Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_redsnail.name: RedSnail™ Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_redyellow.name: Red-Yellow Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_seagreen.name: Seagreen Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_white.name: White Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_winged.name: Ornamental Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.vulcanair_yellow.name: Yellow Vulcanair
entries.mtsofficialpack.aa_base.description: The base of operation. SnailDynamics Anti Air systems require this sturdy baseplate to function properly. Add a crate to load ammo automatically.
entries.mtsofficialpack.aa_base.name: AA Base Plate
entries.mtsofficialpack.aa_turret_37.description: SnailDynamics state of the art defense system. Chambered in 37mm with reliable accuracy, it is the perfect system for dealing massive damage in a short timespan. Due to its small ammunition capacity, it requires well-trained aim to be effective.
entries.mtsofficialpack.aa_turret_37.name: AA 37mm Autocannon
entries.mtsofficialpack.aa_turret_762.descriptio: SnailDynamics state of the art defense system. Double-barreled and with its high firerate, it can shred small aircraft and garuantee accuracy with its volume of fire. Aiming requires greater lead due to lower bullet velocity.
entries.mtsofficialpack.aa_turret_762.name: AA 7.62mm Dual Machine-Gun
entries.mtsofficialpack.ammocrate_bomb_250.descr: A wooden crate fitted to somewhat fit two 250kg bombs. Just pray that those twine handles can withstand half a ton of weight.
entries.mtsofficialpack.ammocrate_bomb_250.name: 250kg Bomb Transport Crate
entries.mtsofficialpack.ammocrate_rocket.descrip: A wide wooden crate fitted to safely store twelve 70mm rocket pod rockets. Dont lift with your back!
entries.mtsofficialpack.ammocrate_rocket.name: 70mm Rocket Transport Crate
entries.mtsofficialpack.ammocrate_shell37.descri: A simple box for storing bulk amounts of 37mm autocannon shells of all kinds. Safety regulations have most definetly been respected.
entries.mtsofficialpack.auxiliary_tank.descripti: An anticorrosive sheetmetal tank produced to hold three extra buckets worth of fuel. Can greatly extend the range of the vehicle its mounted on! Fuel routing ducts not included.
entries.mtsofficialpack.auxiliary_tank.name: Auxiliary Fuel Tank
entries.mtsofficialpack.barrel.description: A simple and trustworthy, all-purpose barrel. It can hold everything your heart desires, like ten buckets of industrial lubricant!
entries.mtsofficialpack.barrel.name: Barrel
entries.mtsofficialpack.barrel_black.name: Black Barrel
entries.mtsofficialpack.barrel_blank.name: Blank Barrel
entries.mtsofficialpack.barrel_blue.name: Blue Barrel
entries.mtsofficialpack.barrel_yellow.name: Yellow Barrel
entries.mtsofficialpack.barrelbell47g.descriptio: An external tank, capable of holding six buckets of extra fuel. Perfect for extending flight time! Warning: It has explosive potential. Keep away from open flames or projectiles. Armor not included.
entries.mtsofficialpack.barrelbell47g.name: Bell 47G External Fuel Tank
entries.mtsofficialpack.basicbomb_hardpoint.desc: When SnailDynamics engineers realized that they had no way to attach their new Basic-Bomb to any aircraft, they came up with this contraption. Due to budget limitations, it can only hold one bomb at once.
entries.mtsofficialpack.basicbomb_hardpoint.name: Bombrack
entries.mtsofficialpack.bomblet_bombrack.descrip: When proper bombs are simply too expensive for your lacking industry, look no further than considering a bomblet rack! It may not hold heavy payloads, but oh does it hold many of them! An airborne hornet nest!
entries.mtsofficialpack.bomblet_bombrack.name: Bomblet Bombrack (PZL37Los)
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedbox.description: A proper storage unit. Put it on a truck and haul big-time.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedbox.name: Brigadier Box Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump.subDescripti: Filled to the brim with gravel.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump.description: Drive around your haul, and if you feel like it, dump it all with the flick of a switch! Or let it place blocks for you for some quick and dirty paving!
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_coal.subDesc: Filled with Germany's favorite energy source.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_coal.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_cobble.subDe: Looks like a truckload of cheap cobblestone.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_cobble.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_copper.subDe: Its filled with... Copper? Carrots? Salmon? You decide.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_copper.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_dirt.subDesc: Yep, looks like its filled with all the dirty secrets.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_dirt.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_gold.subDesc: Contains whats left of the states gold reserves. Or just oversized corn.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_gold.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_hay.subDescr: Hay there! Graineral Cornobi! Dies of fall damage.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_hay.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_iron.subDesc: Filled with bean block! Ah wait, this is raw iron...
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_iron.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_moss.subDesc: Two metric tons worth of fresh weed(s)
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_moss.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_nether.subDe: Filled with raw meat. Or beets. Or netherrack. Ill let you decide.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_nether.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_podzol.subDe: Its podzol. I hope its podzol. Good thing Steve doesnt have a nose...
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_podzol.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_sand.subDesc: Enough material for very ambitious sand castles.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbeddump_sand.name: Brigadier Dump Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedflat.description: The flat area makes it possible to load and transport entire vehicles!
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedflat.name: Brigadier Flatbed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedlogs.name: Brigadier Logging Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedstake.description: This bed has plenty of space for crates and barrels, making it the perfect choice for transporting large amounts of diverse content.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedstake.name: Brigadier Stakebed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedtanker.descriptio: A big tank for when just one barrel of industrial lubricant wont cut it.
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedtanker_blank.name: Blank Tanker Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedtanker_grey.name: Gray Tanker Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedtransport.descrip: This trailer is perfect for kidnap... ahem, giving Villagers a fun tour of your base! It is also useful for transporting personell, livestock and ammunition crates safely across the world. No longer do you have to rely on those pesky boats!
entries.mtsofficialpack.brigbedtransport.name: Grey Brigadier Transport Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.camera_vulcanair.descrip: An Airborne Video Surveillance System installed in the Vulcanair. It features a retractable camera with zooming and night vision functionality. The system is very suitable for surveillance, patrol and reconnaissance tasks.
entries.mtsofficialpack.camera_vulcanair.name: Vulcanair Camera
entries.mtsofficialpack.carseat.description: If you dont want to look like a cheap chap, look no further than installing some proper, high quality leather seats into your fine automobile!
entries.mtsofficialpack.carseat_black.name: Black Car Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.carseat_brown.name: Brown Car Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.carseat_grey.name: Gray Car Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.carseat_maroon.name: Maroon Car Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.carseat_red.name: Red Car Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.carseat_tan.name: Tan Car Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.carseat_white.name: White Car Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.crate.description: A wooden crate for smuggling 'sugar' from that one village. Or to store some cargo and snacks for the trip. You can even paint them for better organisation and distinguishment!
entries.mtsofficialpack.crate.name: Blank Crate
entries.mtsofficialpack.crate_blue.name: Blue Crate
entries.mtsofficialpack.crate_green.name: Green Crate
entries.mtsofficialpack.crate_red.name: Red Crate
entries.mtsofficialpack.crate_white.name: White Crate
entries.mtsofficialpack.cratebell47g.description: This crate has been modified to be mounted on the side of your Bell47g helicopter for extra storage!
entries.mtsofficialpack.cratebell47g.name: Bell 47G External Storage Crate
entries.mtsofficialpack.don_icon.description: A gilded picture of our holy god of MTS/IV, don_bruce™ the allmighty.
entries.mtsofficialpack.don_icon.name: §6don_bruce™ Icon
entries.mtsofficialpack.double_bombrack.descript: SnailDynamics engineers sat down one day and wondered how to increase the PZL.37s bomb load. Only two hours later they came up with the Triple Bomb Rack! (It sounds fancy, but in reality its just a repurposed heavy bomb rack.)
entries.mtsofficialpack.double_bombrack.name: Triple Bombrack (PZL37Los)
entries.mtsofficialpack.drill.description: lmao some yeeyee drill for testing purposes. remember to remove later. totally wont forgor. You wanna this in sUrViVaL? naaah man, look at you goofy face, imagine, imagine getting 69 (nice) netehrite blocks fro a random ass WIP, not even real, deletion sceduled item lamo what! unless youre a streamer then good luck :skull: chicken block
entries.mtsofficialpack.drill.name: Developer Drill
entries.mtsofficialpack.dump_dropper.name: Dump Dropper Logic
entries.mtsofficialpack.dump_hopper.name: Dump Hopper Logic
entries.mtsofficialpack.dump_placer.name: Dump Placer Logic
entries.mtsofficialpack.dump_storage.description: Internal Storage part because effectors are hella goofy
entries.mtsofficialpack.dump_storage.name: Dump Storage
entries.mtsofficialpack.engineallison250.descrip: A lightweight modular turboshaft engine delivering reliable power for medium sized helicopters like the Bell-206. Looks kind of cute from a certain angle.
entries.mtsofficialpack.engineallison250.name: Allison 250 Helicopter Engine
entries.mtsofficialpack.engineamci4.description: American made and fuel efficient, commonly found in Scout pickup trucks.
entries.mtsofficialpack.engineamci4.name: AMC I4 Car Engine
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginebristolmercury.des: A british nine-cylindered, supercharged radial engine with astonishing power and hunger for avgas. Mostly used in military aviation and for getting heavy planes off the ground reliably.
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginedetroitdiesel.desc: Having grown up in Detroit, this engine has seen everything and has learned how to deal with heavy situations. Commonly used in the GMC Brigadier Truck.
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginedetroitdiesel.name: Detroit Diesel Truck Engine
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginefordfe428.descript: A beast of an engine! Eight cylinders provide excellent torque and power, but it guzzles gasoline like no other! Used by the Mustang.
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginefordfe428.name: Ford FE 428 V8 Engine
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginefranklin0335.descr: A bulky six-cylinder engine for light helicopters such as the Bell-47g. Give it some blades and it might just fix that old yee yee ass haircut you got.
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginefranklin0335.name: Franklin O-335 Helicopter Engine
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginelycomingo360.descr: The Lycoming O-360 is one of the most popular aircraft engines in the world. Its design provides a perfect balance between power and efficiency, making it the best choice for civillian aircrafts.
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginelycomingo360.name: Lycoming O-360 Plane Engine
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginemercedesm102.descr: A sturdy engine used in many Mercedes cars from the 1980s. Reliable, easy to maintain, and surprisingly durable, although she is a thirsty one.
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginemercedesm102.name: M102 i4 Mercedes Engine
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginepw610f.description: A small but sophisticated turbofan engine specifically designed for very light jets such as the Eclipse 500.
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginepw610f.name: Pratt & Whitney 610F Jet Engine
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginequad.description: A small single cylinder engine. While it isnt suited for anything bigger than a lawnmower, it will work wonders within a Quad.
entries.mtsofficialpack.enginequad.name: Quad Engine
entries.mtsofficialpack.ft17track.name: Renault FT track
entries.mtsofficialpack.glovebox_skyhawk.descrip: Built in glovebox for the Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.glovebox_skyhawk.name: Glovebox Skyhawk
entries.mtsofficialpack.gloveboxscout.name: Glovebox Scout
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunconfetti.description: A harmless gun firing many small paper scraps everywhere! Partys on! Snail Dynamic tech makes it have infinite shots.
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunconfetti.name: §6Confetti Gun
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunfireextinguisher.desc: Handy to keep around your wood... In case of spontaneous combustion. You can also probably bonk people with it.
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunfireextinguisher.name: Fire Extinguisher
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunflaregun.description: A small red flare gun designed to fire flare cartridges far up into the sky!
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunflaregun.name: Flare Gun
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunft17turret.descriptio: A rotary turret with a built in 37mm snub breech-loading barrel. Load singular shells manually or from a crate.
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunft17turret.name: Renault FT 37mm Turret
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunm1919.name: M1919 Browning Machine Gun
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunobserver.description: The Observers Machine-gun is a gun that is designed to be mounted on larger aircraft like bombers. It allows air to air defense against enemy aircraft.
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunobserver.name: Observers Machine-Gun
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunrocketlauncher.descri: This cheap tube fires an explosive pencil shaped projectile at any unfortunate thing that happens to stand opposite of you!
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunrocketlauncher.name: Rocket Launcher
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunrocketpod.description: Designed by a well known snail and manufactured by Potato Vehicle Industries, this 12-tubed fixed rocket pod can bring devestation upon any structure or enemy, as long as the pilot has good aim. Commiting warcrimes against villagers has never been easier!
entries.mtsofficialpack.gunrocketpod.name: Rocket Pod
entries.mtsofficialpack.heavy_bombrack.descripti: The basic bombrack couldn't hold the weight of a heavy bomb, so SnailDynamics engineers innovated the old design with parts from a dissasembled barbecue grill! Like its predecessor, it can only hold one bomb.
entries.mtsofficialpack.heavy_bombrack.name: Heavy Bombrack (PZL37Los)
entries.mtsofficialpack.hoist_bell206.descriptio: An external personnel carrying device system, designed for helicopter insertion and extraction, also commonly known as a 'longline'. Players, mobs or light cargo may be transported vertically without requiring landing.
entries.mtsofficialpack.hoist_bell206.name: Bell 206 Hoist
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament.subDescri: The classic fuzzy dice. Fits any pimp mobile just as well as any serious racing car!
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament.name: Dice Ornament
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_anvil.sub: Adds 50 lbs of style. Goes well with some heavy metal music!
Worn by pilots. And apparently rearview mirrors too. Thanks Ray!
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_blockacac: A wooden souvenir from your last safari!
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_blockgold: I hope that mirror doenst break off...
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_blockgras: Damn, you sure love dirt in your car.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_butter.su: The beautiful fragnace of rancid butter...
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_car.name: Car Ornament
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_cat.name: Cat Ornament
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_clock.sub: Yes, it works. No, it won’t fix your terrible driving.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_creeper.s: A cute creeper cutout. Smells like gunpowder and moss.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_diamond.s: The pinnacle of reasonable financial decisions.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_emerald.s: Perfect for impressing that cute villager next door!
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_gapple.su: You’ll need the regen after that last parking job...
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_gmc.subDe: Im pretty sure whatever's in that dump can't fall out... I think...
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_gmc.name: GMC Ornament
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_hc.name: Heartcore Ornament
Straight from the arcade. Straight into a tree...
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_mogus.sub: This is quite the suspiciously shaped ornament...
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_nuts.subD: That's nuts! Who would do that?? Oh... it was Henri!
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_nuts.name: Nuts Ornament
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_pine.subD: Makes your car smell like the taiga biome!
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_pine.name: Pine Ornament
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_potato.su: Looking at it warms your heart...
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_rubix.sub: You either someone that solves these in 12 seconds or never at all. Theres no inbetween.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_saturn.su: Even celestial bodies cant escape gizmo culture! Thanks Viktor.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_steak.sub: For those moments where you feel like having a greasy slab of meat dangling in front of you.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_totem.sub: Given your driving record, this thing might not be just for decoration.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mirrorornament_wheel.sub: It technically is a spare wheel...
entries.mtsofficialpack.pontoon.name: Pontoon
entries.mtsofficialpack.propellerrotor.descripti: A small rotor for lighter helicopters. Could double as a ceiling fan...
entries.mtsofficialpack.propellerrotor.name: Small Helicopter Rotor
entries.mtsofficialpack.propellerrotor206.descri: A bigger rotor for real helicopters. Two large blades provide enough lift to keep your obese gluteal region in the air.
entries.mtsofficialpack.propellerrotor206.name: Medium Helicopter Rotor
entries.mtsofficialpack.propellersmall2blade.des: This propeller provides good climb performance, but lacks on cruising performance due to its fixed blade pitch.
entries.mtsofficialpack.propellersmall3blade.des: While this sophisticated propeller might not deliver superb climbing performance, it redeems itself in excellent cruising performance.
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzl37_bombrack.descripti: Dont mind this one, it comes preinstalled with every PLZ.37 you build. We just had to ducttape eight basic bombracks together for... technical reasons.
entries.mtsofficialpack.pzl37_bombrack.name: PZL 37 Built-in Bombrack
entries.mtsofficialpack.salesign.subDescription: A classic sale sign. Name your price!
entries.mtsofficialpack.salesign.name: Sale Sign
entries.mtsofficialpack.salesign_black.subDescri: A black sale sign. Name your price!
entries.mtsofficialpack.salesign_black.name: Black Sale Sign
entries.mtsofficialpack.scoutbedpickup.descripti: This bed allows for extra cargo, be it crates filled with beer and traffic cones or just some unlucky sheep you chose to pick up for your questionable piston contraption. Uninstall it to make room for an entire gun turret!
entries.mtsofficialpack.scoutbedpickup.name: Scout Pickup Bed
entries.mtsofficialpack.scouthardtop.description: A proper roof for your car! Looks classy and keeps your head from getting wet.
entries.mtsofficialpack.scouthardtop.name: Scout Hard-Top
entries.mtsofficialpack.scouthardtop_vinyl.name: Scout Vinyl-Top
entries.mtsofficialpack.scoutpickuproof.descript: For that outback look, choose the pickup roof. Makes your car extra american.
entries.mtsofficialpack.scoutpickuproof.name: Scout Pickup Roof
entries.mtsofficialpack.seat_harness.description: A harness that safely straps you (or any unfortunate farm animal) in and gets lifted by the Bell 206 Hoist. Thy balls be squeezeth.
entries.mtsofficialpack.seat_harness.name: Hoist Harness
entries.mtsofficialpack.seat.description: A somewhat comfortable and cheap seat designed primarily for aircraft. If you're broke or dont care about looks you can also mount them on cars.
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatblack.name: Black Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatblue.name: Blue Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatbrown.name: Brown Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatcyan.name: Cyan Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatgrey.name: Grey Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatolive.name: Olive Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatpink.name: Pink Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatred.name: Red Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatwhite.name: White Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.seatyellow.name: Yellow Seat
entries.mtsofficialpack.skidhelicopter.descripti: A metal rod bent to the shape of a helicopter skid.
entries.mtsofficialpack.skidhelicopter.name: Small Helicopter Skid
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_blue.descriptio: A canister containing chemicals that produce a colorful smoke trail when flying!
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_blue.name: Blue Smoke Canister
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_green.descripti: A canister containing chemicals that produce a colorful smoke trail when flying!
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_green.name: Green Smoke Canister
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_polychrome.desc: This special canister lets you recreate a certain internet meme from 2011!
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_polychrome.name: Polychromatic Smoke Canister
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_red.description: A canister containing chemicals that produce a colorful smoke trail when flying!
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_red.name: Red Smoke Canister
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_white.descripti: A canister that produces a boring white chemtrail when flying.
entries.mtsofficialpack.smokecan_white.name: White Smoke Canister
entries.mtsofficialpack.snail_sculpture.descript: An abstract sculpture molded from clay, representing a snail and her child. Gifted by an anonymus supporter.
entries.mtsofficialpack.snail_sculpture.name: Snail Sculpture
entries.mtsofficialpack.spotlight.description: With this oversized flashlight, SnailDynamics ensures high performance conical photon distribution even on the darkest of nights. This powerful beam marks and lights up any airborne target for your AA gunners to take care of.
entries.mtsofficialpack.spotlight.name: Spotlight
entries.mtsofficialpack.spotlight_bell206.descri: A smaller version of the Snail Dynamics Spotlight, designed to be mounted to lighter airframes. Point out baddies in style!
entries.mtsofficialpack.spotlight_bell206.name: Bell 206 Spotlight
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_black.descripti: OCP-Branded spray can for perfectly legal artistic expression!
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_black.name: Black Spray Can
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_blue.descriptio: OCP-Branded spray can for perfectly legal artistic expression!
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_blue.name: Blue Spray Can
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_glow.descriptio: OCP-Branded spray can for perfectly legal artistic expression! This one even glows!
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_glow.name: Glow Ink Spray Can
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_red.description: OCP-Branded spray can for perfectly legal artistic expression!
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_red.name: Red Spray Can
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_yellow.descript: OCP-Branded spray can for perfectly legal artistic expression!
entries.mtsofficialpack.spraycan_yellow.name: Yellow Spray Can
entries.mtsofficialpack.testingmodule1.descripti: For testing purposes. And destruction. And bombs. Lots of bombs.
entries.mtsofficialpack.testingmodule1.name: Testing Module No.1
entries.mtsofficialpack.watercannon.description: In its base principle, a big pump with a tube, shooting a high pressure stream of water. Ready to be used against large fires. Or protesters.
entries.mtsofficialpack.watercannon.name: Firetruck Watercannon
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge.name: Large Wheel
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge_gold.name: Large Wheel (Gold)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge_goth.name: Large Wheel (Dark)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge_holering.name: Large Wheel (Hole Ring)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge_holes.name: Large Wheel (Holes)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge_legacy.name: Large Wheel (Legacy)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge_rusty.name: Large Wheel (Rusty)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge_spokes.name: Large Wheel (Spokes)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge_spokes2.name: Large Wheel (Spokes 2)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheellarge_whiterim.name: Large Wheel (White Rim)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheelmedium.name: Medium Wheel
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheelmedium_legacy.name: Medium Wheel (Legacy)
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheelsmall.name: Small Wheel
entries.mtsofficialpack.wheelsmall_legacy.name: Small Wheel (Legacy)
entries.mtsofficialpack.basicbomb.description: A basic 250kg bomb using TNT as filler. Falls to the ground due to gravity, deployment above the enemy is advised. Especially effective against stationary fortifications.
entries.mtsofficialpack.basicbomb.name: Basic Bomb
entries.mtsofficialpack.bomblet.description: The Bomblet is a small and cheap alternative to the standard bomb. Weighing mere 25kg, its not capable to do much on its own, but with a full load of these bad boys, you can carpet bomb the enemy into oblivion!
entries.mtsofficialpack.bomblet.name: Bomblet
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700he.description: A 37mm round with a high explosive projectile. It explosive potential makes it perfect for crowd control or the demolition of fortifications.
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700he.name: 37mm Explosive Shell
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700he_mag.descrip: Dont like loading individual shells into your AA? Have six of them in one magazine!
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700he_mag.name: 6rnd Explosive 37mm Magazine
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700proxy.descript: A complex 37mm round, utilising radio frequency sensoring to determine its distance to the target. Excellent for defending against small, hard-to-hit, high velocity aircraft!
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700proxy.name: 37mm Proximity Fuze Shell
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700proxy_mag.desc: Dont like loading individual shells into your AA? Have six of them in one magazine!
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700proxy_mag.name: 6rnd 37mm Proximity Fuze Magazine
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700solid.descript: This 37mm round has a basic solid lead projectile with a steel core. It doesnt damage the terrain but with its raw kinetic energy, it shreds through anything it hits, dealing massive single target damage.
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700solid.name: 37mm Solid Shell
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700solid_mag.desc: Dont like loading individual shells into your AA? Have six of them in one magazine!
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet3700solid_mag.name: 6rnd Solid 37mm Magazine
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet762.description: The 7.62mm is one of the most popular rounds in the world, known for its superb stopping power. Here's 250 of them!
entries.mtsofficialpack.bullet762.name: 7.62mm Bullets
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_blue.descrip: This uncommon flare cartridge is fitted with a bright, blue burning composition.
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_blue.name: Blue Flare Cartridge
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_green.descri: A flare cartridge burning copper compounds to produce a happy green flame! Useful for giving OK signals.
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_green.name: Green Flare Cartridge
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_rainbow.desc: This particular flare cartridge has been fitted with special compounds that let the fired flare burn through the entire color spectrum!
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_rainbow.name: Polychromatic Flare Cartridge
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_red.descript: A standard red flare cartridge. From lighting up the sky to marking particular areas or giving off distress signals, this popular flare type has seen it all.
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_red.name: Red Flare Cartridge
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_white.descri: An aluminum cartrige filled with a pyrotechnical magnesium based composition that burns in a very bright, white light for up to 1.5 minutes.
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_white.name: White Flare Cartridge
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_yellow.descr: A yellow flare cartridge we stole from a rusty fighter jet! It probably used to be some kind of countermeasure... which happens to fit your flare gun perfectly!
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletflare_yellow.name: Yellow Flare Cartridge
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletrocket.description: 70mm folding-fin unguided solid fuel rockets, carrying a high-explosive warhead. Reccomended use against light fortifications and slow moving targets. Handle with care.
entries.mtsofficialpack.bulletrocket.name: Rocket Pod Rockets
entries.mtsofficialpack.extinguisherfoam.descrip: For refilling your trusty fire extinguisher!
entries.mtsofficialpack.extinguisherfoam.name: Extinguisher Foam
entries.mtsofficialpack.heavy_bomb.description: Is the basic bomb to basic for you? Do you want a bigger bang for your buck? Then look no further and install SnailDynamics 1000kg Heavy BombTM! Fun for the whole bomber crew... just not for those below you.
entries.mtsofficialpack.heavy_bomb.name: Heavy Bomb
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_black.description: Black paint for your refillable OCP-branded spray can.
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_black.name: Black Spraypaint
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_blue.description: Blue paint for your refillable OCP-branded spray can.
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_blue.name: Blue Spraypaint
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_glow.description: Glowing ink for your refillable OCP-branded spray can.
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_glow.name: Glowing Spraypaint
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_red.description: Red paint for your refillable OCP-branded spray can.
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_red.name: Red Spraypaint
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_yellow.description: Yellow paint for your refillable OCP-branded spray can.
entries.mtsofficialpack.paint_yellow.name: Yellow Spraypaint
entries.mtsofficialpack.watercannon_proj.descrip: Heavy, big tank full of water, used by the watercannon.
entries.mtsofficialpack.watercannon_proj.name: Watercannnon Water Tank
entries.mtsofficialpack.beacon_top.description: This white cupola tells your plane where it is at all times. It knows this becaue it knows where it isnt. By subtracting where it is, from where it isn't, or where it isn't, from where it is, whichever is greater, it obtains a difference, or deviation
entries.mtsofficialpack.beacon_top.name: Beacon
entries.mtsofficialpack.beacon_tower.description: This white cupola (with tower) tells your plane where it is at all times. It knows this becaue it knows where it isnt. By subtracting where it is, from where it isn't, or where it isn't, from where it is, whichever is greater, it obtains a difference, or deviation. It also holds a dark secret.
entries.mtsofficialpack.crashbarrier.name: Crash Barrier
entries.mtsofficialpack.fluidloader.description: Adds fluids to tanks/barrels on vehicles.  Connect pipes to the bottom.
entries.mtsofficialpack.fluidloader.name: Fluid Loader
entries.mtsofficialpack.fluidunloader.descriptio: Removes fluids from tanks/barrels on vehicles.  Connect pipes to the bottom.
entries.mtsofficialpack.fluidunloader.name: Fluid Unloader
entries.mtsofficialpack.fuelpump.name: Fuel Pump
entries.mtsofficialpack.itemloader.description: Adds items to crates on vehicles.
entries.mtsofficialpack.itemloader.name: Item Loader
entries.mtsofficialpack.itemunloader.description: Removes items from crates on vehicles.
entries.mtsofficialpack.itemunloader.name: Item Unloader
entries.mtsofficialpack.prop1.name: Ammo Box
entries.mtsofficialpack.prop2.description: A couple of decorative 37mm shells. They dont do much other than being pointy.
entries.mtsofficialpack.prop2.name: AP Shell Pile
entries.mtsofficialpack.prop3.description: A couple of decorative 37mm shells. Darkmode version
entries.mtsofficialpack.prop3.name: Proxy Shell Pile
entries.mtsofficialpack.prop4.description: A pile of decorative 37mm magazines. They smell like oily metal.
entries.mtsofficialpack.prop4.name: 37mm Magazine Pile
entries.mtsofficialpack.prop5.description: A couple of decorative 37mm shells. These used to be the spicy ones.
entries.mtsofficialpack.prop5.name: HE Shell Pile
entries.mtsofficialpack.signalcontroller.name: Signal Controller
entries.mtsofficialpack.telephonebooth.name: Telephone Booth
entries.mtsofficialpack.trafficcone.description: Its a goddamn traffic cone, what do you want me to write here. It cones traffic!
entries.mtsofficialpack.trafficcone.name: Traffic Cone
entries.mtsofficialpack.pole_core.name: Pole
entries.mtsofficialpack.pole_crossingsignal.name: Crossing Signal
entries.mtsofficialpack.pole_streetlight.name: Street Light
entries.mtsofficialpack.pole_trafficsignal.name: Traffic Signal
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_bump.name: Uneven Road
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_cow.name: Animals
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_crosswalk.name: Crosswalk
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_deadend.name: Dead End
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_donotenter.name: Do Not Enter
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_entryforbidden.desc: Doubles as [Entry Forbidden] if left blank.
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_entryforbidden.name: Speed Limit (EU)

entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_highwayend.name: Highway End

entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_mts.name: MTS (AKA Free Product Placement)

entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_oneway_right.name: One Way (Right)
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_priority.name: Priority
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_priorityend.name: Priority End
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_restrictionsend.des: Marks the end of any imposed speed limit.
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_route.name: Route
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_speedlimit.name: Speed Limit
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_stop.name: Stop
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_turn_left.name: Turn Left
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_turn_right.name: Turn Right
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_wrongway.name: Wrong Way
entries.mtsofficialpack.sign_yield.name: Yield
entries.mtsofficialpack.armorplate.description: Composite armor plating made from durable materials. Made to resist more than just arrows and swords...
entries.mtsofficialpack.armorplate.name: Armored Plating
entries.mtsofficialpack.basecartridge.descriptio: An empty, high caliber shell casing.
entries.mtsofficialpack.basecartridge.name: Empty Shell
entries.mtsofficialpack.blowtorch.name: Blowtorch
entries.mtsofficialpack.circuit.description: A compact electronic logical system fastened on a plastic board. Its structure is mesmerizing.
entries.mtsofficialpack.circuit.name: Electronic Circuit
entries.mtsofficialpack.copperwire.description: A roll of conductive wire. Just pretend its copper and not gold seasoned with redstone dust.
entries.mtsofficialpack.copperwire.name: Copper Wire
entries.mtsofficialpack.explosives.name: Explosives
entries.mtsofficialpack.fuzeimpact.description: This fuze triggeres once it makes contact with your unlucky target.
entries.mtsofficialpack.fuzeimpact.name: Impact Fuze
entries.mtsofficialpack.fuzeproxy.description: A complex fuze, utilising radio frequency sensoring to determine its distance to the target.
entries.mtsofficialpack.fuzeproxy.name: Proximity Fuze
entries.mtsofficialpack.headlight.description: Generates photons. Shiny. You can see yourself in the reflector!
entries.mtsofficialpack.headlight.name: Headlight
entries.mtsofficialpack.hydraulics.description: A fluids incompressible nature allows for its utilisation in mechanical systems and heavy machinery.
entries.mtsofficialpack.hydraulics.name: Hydraulic System
entries.mtsofficialpack.irsensor.description: A small, delicate, optoelectronic component. It can sense your body heat.
entries.mtsofficialpack.irsensor.name: Infrared Sensor
entries.mtsofficialpack.metaltube.description: Its hollow. Dont drop it, it might impact meme culture.
entries.mtsofficialpack.metaltube.name: Metal Tube
entries.mtsofficialpack.mre.description: Compact quality high-protein, dehydrated food in a bag.
entries.mtsofficialpack.mre.name: SnailDynamics MRE
entries.mtsofficialpack.nuts.name: Nuts
entries.mtsofficialpack.ocpbutter.description: A very rancid stick of butter found in Mr.Mulles house. Its three months past its expiration date...
entries.mtsofficialpack.ocpbutter.name: OCP Butter
entries.mtsofficialpack.piston.name: Small Piston
entries.mtsofficialpack.plastic.name: Plastic
entries.mtsofficialpack.plating.description: Oh Sheet! A thin sheet of metal with predrilled holes.
entries.mtsofficialpack.plating.name: Metal Sheet
entries.mtsofficialpack.processor.description: You could probably run Doom on that.
entries.mtsofficialpack.processor.name: Processing Unit
entries.mtsofficialpack.repairkit.description: This repair kit can aid in restoring a totaled vehicle! However, due to its specialized equipment, it is unsuited for regular repair jobs.
entries.mtsofficialpack.repairkit.name: Repair Kit
entries.mtsofficialpack.rods.name: Rods
entries.mtsofficialpack.screws.description: An assortment of various screws, bolts and nuts.
entries.mtsofficialpack.screws.name: Screws
entries.mtsofficialpack.smallarmscartridge.descr: A handfull of empty small arms casings.
entries.mtsofficialpack.smallarmscartridge.name: Small Empty Casings
entries.mtsofficialpack.solidfuel.description: Composite of oxidizer and energetic fuel. It smells sweet.
entries.mtsofficialpack.solidfuel.name: Solid Propellant
entries.mtsofficialpack.sparkplug.name: Spark Plug
entries.mtsofficialpack.spring.description: A steel helix. Springs you right back to that discovery you made about ducks...
entries.mtsofficialpack.spring.name: Spring
entries.mtsofficialpack.instrument_aircraft_atti: Indicates where the plane is pointing.
entries.mtsofficialpack.instrument_aircraft_beac: Distance Measuring Equipment. Displays distance to a connected beacon in blocks.
entries.mtsofficialpack.instrument_aircraft_flap: Indicates flap setpoint and current value.
Displays instrument landing system (ILS) information for beacons.
entries.mtsofficialpack.instrument_car_clock.des: For when you need to know the time on the go
entries.mtsofficialpack.instrument_car_gear.name: Gear Indicator
entries.mtsofficialpack.instrument_car_spedomete: Indicates speed in Blocks Per Second.
Indicates speed in Kilometers Per Hour.
Indicates speed in Miles Per Hour.
